title: Compilation failure: error: use of undeclared identifier 'x'

features.name: parameter_shadowing_in_super_constructor_call
features.description: Code should include a subclass constructor with a local variable that shadows a parameter of a method called as argument to super.new(). The local variable in the subclass constructor has the same name as a parameter in the method being called, causing name resolution failure in generated C++ code.

features.name: method_call_in_super_new_arguments
features.description: Code should include a super.new() call where one argument is a method call that references a locally scoped variable with the same name as the method's parameter, creating ambiguous name resolution in the generated C++ code.
